category_sources: source_facts.description says SOCKS client wrapper for BSD/macOS; official homepage describes dsocks as a SOCKS client wrapper for BSD/Mac OS X.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is dsocks; official homepage heading is dsocks.
docs_sources: Official homepage provides usage examples, download information, and related links, making it the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage lists the source-control checkout command svn co http://dsocks.googlecode.com/svn/trunk/ dsocks.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage describe SOCKS4/SOCKS5 wrapping, OpenSSH/Tor SOCKS proxy use, DNS leak prevention, and BSD/macOS support.
